items.title: Partnership Proposal — Hydrate IV Bar co-branded IV packages
items.summary: Hydrate IV Bar wants to discuss co-branded IV therapy packages for Miami and Houston locations. They have budget allocated and want a 20-minute call this week.
items.actionNeeded: Respond to meeting request for Thursday or Friday to discuss partnership.

items.title: UPQODE Website Launch — Final Approval Needed Today
items.summary: UPQODE team is blocked on website production launch pending final approval on copy changes. Client demo scheduled for tomorrow morning.
items.actionNeeded: Review and approve website copy changes today or flag remaining changes.

items.title: LeadMaker Sales Proposal Follow-up — SDR for inbound leads
items.summary: LeadMaker following up on full-time SDR proposal for inbound lead management and appointment setting discussed last week.
items.actionNeeded: Respond to LeadMaker if interested in scheduling SDR candidate review.
